# ResuFit

> AI-powered ATS resume optimizer. Upload your resume and a job description — get a fully tailored, ATS-compatible resume in under 10 seconds.

## What ResuFit does

ResuFit analyzes your resume against a specific job description and rebuilds it to pass Applicant Tracking System (ATS) filters used by 95%+ of Fortune 500 companies. It identifies missing keywords, fixes formatting issues that cause ATS rejection, rewrites bullet points using the X-Y-Z impact formula, and generates a professional summary tailored to the target role.

## Who it's for

Job seekers applying to roles in any industry. Especially useful when applying to companies that use automated screening software (which is most large employers).

## Pricing

- **One-time**: $5 (£5 / €5) — single optimized resume download
- **Pro Plan**: $15/month (£15 / €15) — 30 optimizations per month, cancel anytime
- **Annual Plan**: $99/year (£99 / €99) — 50 optimizations per month, best value

## Key features

- ATS keyword matching against 50+ hiring platforms
- Format compatibility fixes (removes tables, columns, graphics that ATS cannot read)
- Tone-of-voice matching — output sounds like you, but stronger
- Skill gap follow-up — asks targeted questions post-payment to fill resume gaps
- Four professional templates: Executive, Modern, Minimal, Classic
- PDF and DOCX download

## Links

- Homepage: https://resufit.co
- Sign up: https://resufit.co/sign-up
